title: Create：FluidLogistic
description: Integrate fluid transportation with Create's logistics system
body: # Welcome to Create FluidLogistic This mod expands the logistics system of Create 6.0, adding a fluid logistics system suitable for various fluids. ## Items - Fluid Package - Fluid Packager, Fluid Repackager - Faucet, Smart Faucet - Fluid Transporter, Smart Hopper - Fluid Hatch, Multi Fluid Access Port - Multi-Fluid Tank, Horizontal Multi-Fluid Tank - Fluid Pump - Hand Pointer - Mechanical Fluid Gun - Encased waterlogged leaves ## Tips #### Factory Gauge/Redstone Requester - Hold down **Alt** and **right-click** on an item containing fluid to request the fluid. #### Clipboard - Enter a package address in the Clipboard and then **right-click** on packager/repackager to set its address. ## Credits - The resourcepacks by GALLIUM0202
